title: “Alabama asks Supreme Court to allow use of congressional map helping GOP, despite racial bias ruling”
summary:
Mark Sherman at the AP:
Alabama on Wednesday asked the Supreme Court to allow it to use a congressional map favoring Republicans in this year’s elections, despite a lower court’s ruling that the redistricting plan intentionally discriminates against Black… Continue reading

summary:
Post & Courier:

title: REALM, DelShah Capital, And A.M. Properties: Acquisition Of CitySpire Midtown Manhattan Office Condominium
summary:
REALM, in partnership with DelShah Capital and A.M. Properties, announced the acquisition of CitySpire, a 377,000-square-foot office condominium spanning 24 floors within the 70-story tower at 156 West 56th Street in Midtown Manhattan.
The post REALM, DelShah Capital, And A.M. Properties: Acquisition Of CitySpire Midtown Manhattan Office Condominium appeared first on Pulse 2.0.

title: Didit: $7.5 Million Seed Funding Raised To Build Identity Infrastructure For The AI Era
summary:
Didit announced it has closed an additional $6 million in seed funding, bringing its total seed financing to $7.5 million as the company builds identity infrastructure designed for the AI era. The funding will support global go-to-market expansion, product development, broader programmable identity and fraud coverage, and hiring across product, sales, and customer success teams.
The post Didit: $7.5 Million Seed Funding Raised To Build Identity Infrastructure For The AI Era appeared first on Pulse 2.0.

title: D-CRBN: €17.5 Million Raised For Electrified Plasma Technology To Scale Industrial Decarbonization
summary:
D-CRBN announced the successful closing of a €17.5 million Series A funding round led by Astaia, with participation from SFPIM and the EIC, European Innovation Council Fund. The funding will support the company’s efforts to scale its electrified plasma reactor technology, accelerate industrial pilot programs, and move toward initial commercial deployments.
The post D-CRBN: €17.5 Million Raised For Electrified Plasma Technology To Scale Industrial Decarbonization appeared first on Pulse 2.0.

title: NANO Nuclear: $13 Million STS Acquisition Establishes Integrated Nuclear Fuel Logistics Platform
summary:
NANO Nuclear Energy announced the acquisition of Secured Transportation Services (STS), a specialized nuclear logistics and transportation company, in a deal valued at up to $13 million. The acquisition is designed to strengthen NANO Nuclear’s position as a vertically integrated advanced nuclear energy company by adding fuel transportation and deployment capabilities to its growing microreactor business.
The post NANO Nuclear: $13 Million STS Acquisition Establishes Integrated Nuclear Fuel Logistics Platform appeared first on Pulse 2.0.

title: Lumber: Agentic Compliance Platform Launched Through Pivla Acquisition
summary:
Lumber, an AI-powered construction workforce management platform, announced the acquisition of Pivla, a construction-focused AI company specializing in prevailing wage and apprenticeship compliance, tax credit optimization, and regulatory automation. The deal marks Lumber’s expansion into what it describes as “agentic compliance,” an AI-driven category focused on both regulatory adherence and identifying funding opportunities tied to labor compliance.
The post Lumber: Agentic Compliance Platform Launched Through Pivla Acquisition appeared first on Pulse 2.0.

title: Ivy Technology: Acquisition Of ISP Tek Services Expands IT Asset Recovery And Refurbishment Operations
summary:
Ivy Technology, a portfolio company of Staple Street Capital, announced the acquisition of ISP Tek Services from Close the Loop. The deal expands Ivy Technology’s IT asset disposition capabilities by adding secure asset recovery, refurbishment, and resale services while also extending the company’s operational footprint into Mexico.
The post Ivy Technology: Acquisition Of ISP Tek Services Expands IT Asset Recovery And Refurbishment Operations appeared first on Pulse 2.0.

title: DAZN: Global Broadcast Rights Deal Expands IFAF Flag Football Reach Ahead Of LA28 Olympics
summary:
DAZN has acquired global broadcast rights to the International Federation of American Football’s flag football competitions under a new multi-year agreement, significantly expanding worldwide access to the rapidly growing sport ahead of its Olympic debut at the 2028 Summer Olympics.
The post DAZN: Global Broadcast Rights Deal Expands IFAF Flag Football Reach Ahead Of LA28 Olympics appeared first on Pulse 2.0.

title: Goldenpeak Acquires Ampere Analysis And Backs PlumResearch Expansion
summary:
Goldenpeak announced a majority investment in Ampere Analysis, a data and analytics company focused on the media, games, and sports industries. The investment is intended to support Ampere Analysis’ growth initiatives, including the simultaneous acquisition of PlumResearch, an entertainment industry data company specializing in audience insights.
The post Goldenpeak Acquires Ampere Analysis And Backs PlumResearch Expansion appeared first on Pulse 2.0.

title: CareCloud Acquires Empower Healthcare & Compliance Partners
summary:
CareCloud announced it has acquired Empower Healthcare & Compliance Partners, a healthcare compliance and advisory firm, adding a fast-growing compliance business to its AI-powered healthcare platform. The transaction closed on May 22, 2026, with Empower now operating as a CareCloud company.
The post CareCloud Acquires Empower Healthcare & Compliance Partners appeared first on Pulse 2.0.

title: Keystone Group: Sheraton Indianapolis City Centre Hotel Acquisition Will Become Renaissance Hotel
summary:
Keystone Group announced it has acquired the Sheraton Indianapolis City Centre Hotel and plans to transform the property into a new Renaissance hotel, marking Keystone’s first development under Marriott International’s Renaissance Hotels lifestyle brand.
The post Keystone Group: Sheraton Indianapolis City Centre Hotel Acquisition Will Become Renaissance Hotel appeared first on Pulse 2.0.

title: Lilly To Buy Vaccine Company For Up To $1.55 Billion
summary:
Vaccine Company announced it has entered into a definitive agreement to be acquired by Eli Lilly and Company in a deal valued at up to $1.55 billion, including upfront and milestone-based payments. The acquisition is intended to accelerate the development of Vaccine Company’s next-generation vaccine platform and pipeline targeting Epstein-Barr Virus (EBV) and other infectious diseases.
The post Lilly To Buy Vaccine Company For Up To $1.55 Billion appeared first on Pulse 2.0.

title: Olympus: $270 Million BioProtect Acquisition Expands Urology And Prostate Cancer Portfolio
summary:
Olympus announced it has signed a definitive agreement to acquire BioProtect Ltd. for $270 million as the company expands its oncology and urology technology portfolio focused on prostate cancer care.
The post Olympus: $270 Million BioProtect Acquisition Expands Urology And Prostate Cancer Portfolio appeared first on Pulse 2.0.

title: ReVision Implant: €4 Million Raised To Advance Brain Implant Vision Restoration Technology Into Clinical Testing
summary:
ReVision Implant announced that it closed an oversubscribed €4 million capital round as the company advances its neurotechnology platform designed to restore vision in blind individuals. The funding will support scaling operations and moving the company’s preclinical research into clinical testing.
The post ReVision Implant: €4 Million Raised To Advance Brain Implant Vision Restoration Technology Into Clinical Testing appeared first on Pulse 2.0.

title: Nocera: Up To $300 Million Facility Expanded For AI, Data Centers, Robotics, Biotech And Digital Assets Strategy
summary:
Nocera announced plans to transform into Nocera Holdings, a diversified technology-focused holding company targeting sectors including artificial intelligence, AI infrastructure, data centers, robotics, biotech, blockchain and digital assets. The company said the strategic shift follows an amendment to its previously announced financing facility of up to $300 million, which now permits proceeds to be used for acquisitions, strategic investments, partnerships, working capital initiatives and broader expansion opportunities across global technology markets.

title: Core Scientific: Industry Veteran Steve Smith Appointed To Board Of Directors
summary:
Core Scientific announced the appointment of Steve Smith to its Board of Directors, effective immediately. Smith will also serve on the company’s Nominating and Corporate Governance Committee.
The post Core Scientific: Industry Veteran Steve Smith Appointed To Board Of Directors appeared first on Pulse 2.0.

title: “AP adds OpenAI as elections customer”
summary:
AP release:
The Associated Press today announced that it will provide its U.S. election results to OpenAI, reinforcing AP’s vote count as the undisputed standard of information about U.S. elections for media organizations and technology platforms worldwide.
